headline: Clinical Operations / eClinical Transformation / Regulatory-grade Data Solutions

positioning.primary: Clinical Operations / eClinical Transformation / Regulatory Data Solutions
target_roles_strong: Senior SME / Consultant Clinical Operations Technology

summary: Leader senior Clinical Operations avec 28+ ans d'expérience en développement pharmaceutique global, opérations cliniques et non cliniques, conformité GCP/ICH, inspection readiness, gouvernance CTMS/EDC et déploiement de solutions eClinical / regulatory data. Profil particulièrement fort à l'interface R&D, opérations, qualité, réglementaire, CROs/vendors, équipes IT/SQA/SME et clients pharma internationaux.
core_domains: Site activation / study start-up / enrollment strategy
strong_proofs: 28+ years in clinical and nonclinical research operations
13+ years full remote global delivery for regulatory technology programs
12-year CDISC/SEND regulatory platform engagement with major pharma clients
Expansion of nonclinical study coverage to 100% by 2025 in a major long-term client program
Multi-client deployments involving BMS, Bayer, Ipsen, Sanofi and other pharma/biotech accounts
48+ countries field operations performance/compliance deployment during Wyeth/Pfizer period
EDC-to-CTMS patient data integration and harmonization across European operations
Global CTMS IMPACT deployment for European Research Organisation hubs including Africa and APAC
Roadshow training / deployment support for approximately 250 CRA FTEs EMEA/APAC
Awards: IMPACT Project Team Award 1999; Enbrel Task Force Award 1998

experience.scope: Global regulatory/eClinical delivery for pharma clients
highlights: Directed long-term CDISC/SEND regulatory program for a major pharma client
Expanded program scope to cover 100% of nonclinical studies by 2025
Led multi-client solution deployments across BMS, Bayer, Ipsen, Sanofi and other accounts
Managed cross-functional teams of SMEs, developers and SQA leads
Supported bid defenses, dispute mitigation, client retention and new business acquisition

experience.role: Assistant Director, European Field Operations Quality Support
experience.scope: Pan-European clinical operations quality and performance framework
highlights: Unified clinical operations quality metrics across Pfizer/Wyeth merger
Harmonized CTMS systems, KPIs and benchmarking frameworks
Served as primary EU liaison to Global Clinical Auditing group
Coordinated inspection-readiness responses across study teams and country heads
Led EDC-to-CTMS integration as subject matter expert

experience.role: Project Manager, Field Operations Technology and Quality Support
experience.scope: Global field operations technology, quality support and benchmarking
highlights: Built corporate GCP compliance monitoring framework
Designed global KPIs for Site Management and Clinical Trial Operations
Authored RACI chart for CTMS responsibilities
Delivered executive-level performance reporting to Global Site Management Heads

experience.role: Senior Clinical Operations Coordinator, European Research Organization
experience.scope: European clinical project coordination and technology rollout
highlights: Served as European Clinical Project Manager on global Phase II POC studies in IBD
Coordinated start-up, regulatory submissions and site initiations across EU countries
Led requirements definition and rollout of eCRF and eMonitor platforms
Trained and mentored contract monitors on GCP/ICH and site visit reporting standards

experience.scope: Field operations analytics, CTMS deployment and enrollment forecasting
highlights: Delivered global CTMS IMPACT implementation for European Research Organisation hubs including Africa and APAC
Built enrollment forecasting models across Phase I-IV studies
Supported Enbrel Phase III RA registration operations
Received IMPACT Project Team Award and Enbrel Task Force Award

experience.scope: Clinical sample processing and PK/PD support
highlights: Supported antiviral therapy PK/PD work in HIV context
Contributed to publication/poster support

experience.role: Monitoring Data Analyst Clinical Affairs Europe
experience.scope: Forecasting, reporting and outsourced monitoring validation

fit_decision_guidance.85_plus: Strong fit. Generate adapted CV and interview preparation.
fit_decision_guidance.70_84: Good fit but clarify scope, management and hands-on expectations.
fit_decision_guidance.50_69: Partial fit. Run diagnostic before CV adaptation.
fit_decision_guidance.below_50: Likely off-target. Recommend refusal or repositioning.

probe_questions.question: Souhaites-tu viser prioritairement Clinical Operations Director, eClinical Program Director, Regulatory Data Solutions Lead, CDISC/SEND Program Lead ou consultant SME senior ?
Quel est le niveau exact de management récent : hiérarchique, transverse, client governance, vendors/CROs, équipes IT/SQA/SME ?
Quelles certifications sont réellement obtenues ou renouvelées : GCP, CDISC, PMP, Scrum, CSV, 21 CFR Part 11 ?
Quelle est la part entre cadrage métier, configuration, validation, recette, data governance et développement réel ?
Confirmer anglais opérationnel, mobilité internationale, full remote/hybride et contraintes éventuelles.

interview_traps: Pourquoi bouger après 13+ ans sur une mission très stable ?
Es-tu expert clinique, chef de programme IT, consultant SME ou product/delivery lead ?
Quelle est ta valeur si le poste demande du people management direct récent ?
Quelle est ta valeur si le poste demande une forte part hands-on data ou technique ?
Comment prouves-tu l'impact business et réglementaire des plateformes déployées ?
do_not_claim_without_proof: Certification officielle PMP/Scrum/CDISC/GCP/CSV/21 CFR Part 11 non confirmée
Coordonnées personnelles ou identité complète sur page publique
source_note: Built from user-provided LinkedIn-style raw profile and existing anonymized TBZ socle. Public demo must remain anonymized.
